channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jokic wraps up triple-double average for season, 3rd NBA player to achieve that feat
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic will average a triple-double for the season, making the Denver star the third player in NBA history to pull off such a feat. It became statistically certain Friday night when Jokic got his fourth assist of Denver’s game against the Memphis Grizzlies.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phil Wertman Invitational: GJ's Bryce Flanagan dominates 800m and more
item.description: The sun scorched down on Stocker Stadium Friday for the Phil Wertman Invitational. But the heat did not stop many of the Western Slope's top athletes from showing off their speed, power and verticals.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake heads to the Music City to face Nashville SC
item.description: Fresh off a statement win over the defending MLS champion LA Galaxy, Real Salt Lake hits the road this Saturday to take on Nashville SC at GEODIS Park.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Like father, like son: Shoei Darvish steps on the hill for Dons
item.description: With a flurry of pitches, Shoei Darvish showed the skills that we've already seen in Petco Park from his father. But make no mistake, this junior righty is doing it on his terms - but with some talented influence.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Congrats to Beth - the Beat Big Will Bracket Challenge Winner
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — The final buzzer has sounded. The confetti has fallen. The Florida Gators are National Champions. KREX Sports Anchor Big Will Levenson was in the building to watch his Alma Mater Florida rise to the top of the College Basketball World. "Greatest experience of my life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: A Florida home with historical ties, including to baseball legend Babe Ruth, hit the market for just under $2 million.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: The 1924 craftsman bungalow, located in St. Petersburg's Historic Old Northeast neighborhood, once belonged to Ruth, according to the real estate listing.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nolan Jones draws walk with bases-loaded to give Guardians 1-0 victory over White Sox in home opener
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Nolan Jones drew a bases-loaded walk from Mike Clevinger in the ninth inning, and the Cleveland Guardians won their home opener 1-0 over the Chicago White Sox on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Steele tosses 7 innings as the Cubs pound the Rangers 7-0 on frigid night
item.description: Justin Steele tossed three-hit ball over seven innings, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 7-0 on a frigid Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Tickets to the Salt Lake Bees new stadium will cost you more than they used to
item.description: The Salt Lake Bees are playing their first game at the new ballpark in South Jordan tomorrow, though fans of the team might notice that prices are a little different than Smith's Ballpark.
item.dc:creator: Sorina Trauntvein, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: The Masters: When it starts, how to watch, betting odds for golf's first major of 2025
item.description: Rory McIlroy got off to a fast start and finished with a 6-under 66 on Saturday, putting him at 12 under heading into the final round of the Masters.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: UConn dominates South Carolina in women's national championship
item.description: A huge win for the UConn Huskies Sunday as the team dominated the South Carolina Gamecocks and made history inside Amalie Arena.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
